description: Inter-session/inter-agent/inter-project messaging plugin for Agent Zero. Phase 4 complete: forward action (forward inbox message to another session), broadcast action (send to all active sessions), cross-project permission checking (_check_cross_project_permission), auto-inbox check extension (agent_loop_end hook), 7 messenger actions total (send, check, reply, forward, broadcast, list_sessions, switch_session).
gaps_known: session_manager.py imports agent/AgentContext which won't exist in test — must mock via sys.modules or patch.dict before importing MessengerTool
_check marks messages as read — tests needing message_id for _forward must read inbox with mark_read=False first
_check_cross_project_permission checks from_project against allowed list, not to_project — test accordingly
notes: Phase 1: send/check/reply, JSONL mailbox, 5 tests. Phase 2: SessionRegistry, MessageBus, list_sessions, 7 tests. Phase 4: forward, broadcast, cross-project permissions, auto-inbox extension, 8 tests. Phase 5: config resolution, permission integration, 6 tests. Phase 6: 13 tests — switch_session (spawn_session call args + 2 return shapes + resilience), timeout (custom/default), multi-step chain, forward annotation, cross-project blocking, broadcast, auto-inbox (communicate/UserMessage assertion), parallel sessions, routing state persistence (no inline func, JSON round-trip + real send), forward-already-read (not found), reply-nonexistent-thread (not found), broadcast-self-only (no active sessions), forward-cross-project-blocked.
